title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: BioticExplorerServer R package downloads NMD Biotic XML data Institute Marine Research (IMR) internal API compiles DuckDB database. serves backend data engine BioticExplorer Shiny application. core functionality requires IMR intranet access (VPN HI-adm WiFi).

title: CLAUDE.md
text: automated tests. Manual testing requires IMR intranet access.
code: # Generate documentation from Roxygen2 comments and update NAMESPACE devtools::document()  # Build and check the package (runs R CMD check) devtools::check()  # Load all functions into the current session (faster than install) devtools::load_all()  # Install the package devtools::install()

title: CLAUDE.md
code: IMR NMD API (XML)        │        ▼ downloadDatabase()      ← called per year inside compileDatabase()        │        ▼ bioticToDatabase()      ← parses XML via RstoxData::readXmlFile(), merges        │                   mission/station/catchsample/individual/age tables,        │                   adds ICES area (spatial join via sf),        │                   adds gear category (lookup via gearCodes)        ▼ DuckDB tables: mission, stnall, indall, ageall, filesize, metadata        │        ▼ indexDatabase()         ← creates dbIndex.rda for BioticExplorer Shiny app

title: CLAUDE.md
text: compileDatabase() orchestrates full workflow. calls prepareCruiseSeriesList() prepareGearList() reference data, loops years calling downloadDatabase(), finally calls indexDatabase(). database typically takes several hours compile scratch requires >2 GB disk space.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: DuckDB connection: one write connection allowed time; read-connections can coexist. connection passed explicitly functions (stored globally). S3 class: bioticToDatabase() returns bioticProcData object custom print method. main tables $stnall, $indall, $ageall, $mission. Bundled reference data: data/cruiseSeries.rda, data/gearList.rda, data/icesAreas.rda pre-compiled loaded automatically. updated running prepareCruiseSeriesList(), prepareGearList(), prepareICESareas() respectively, saved usethis::use_data(..., overwrite = TRUE). Network retries: downloadDatabase() retries failed downloads 4 times giving year. Timeout: zzz.R sets options(timeout = 3000) package attach handle large XML downloads.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Biotic data: https://biotic-api.hi./apis/nmdapi/biotic/v3/{year}/cache?version=3.1 Reference data: https://reference-api.hi./apis/nmdapi/reference/v2/...

title: CLAUDE.md
code: con <- DBI::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(), dbdir = "path/to/db.duckdb", read_only = TRUE) stnall  <- dplyr::tbl(con, "stnall")   # station-level data (lazy) indall  <- dplyr::tbl(con, "indall")   # individual fish measurements (lazy) ageall  <- dplyr::tbl(con, "ageall")   # age readings (lazy) mission <- dplyr::tbl(con, "mission")  # cruise/mission metadata (lazy)

what: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
text: R Package Downloading Server-Side Data BioticExplorer  package downloads compiles IMR Biotic survey database DuckDB database, providing programmatic access institute’s Biotic data R. serves data backend BioticExplorer Shiny application.

title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
code: remotes::install_github("DeepWaterIMR/BioticExplorerServer")

title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
text: BioticExplorerServer package (BES) downloads compiles IMR Biotic database duckdb database. download requires stable intranet access (VPN, cable within institute web HI-adm WiFi). database requires 2 Gb disk space. Make sure modify dbPath argument choose appropriate location database. store folder synced cloud due size, mindful institute’s data policy. data licensed NLOD (governmental version CCBY), external data within database must shared outside institute. using package, accept responsibility handling IMR Biotic data according licenses regulations. advisable run download command separate R session screen session terminal Unix machines, downloading database takes several hours requires stable internet connection. connection unstable, function may return error. cases, ensure connection stable rerun command. function continue downloading left .
code: library(BioticExplorerServer) compileDatabase(dbPath = "~/IMR_biotic_BES_database") # default dbPath, written out to show it

title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
text: Currently, entire database must re-downloaded update IMR Biotic database last modified tags. update database, can following: process first downloads database file named bioticexplorer-next.duckdb, deletes old database renames bioticexplorer-next.duckdb bioticexplorer.duckdb. Since downloading takes time, can continue using database another R session download progress. priority, can also overwrite existing database:
code: library(BioticExplorerServer) compileDatabase(dbPath = "~/IMR_biotic_BES_database",                 dbName = "bioticexplorer-next") unlink(normalizePath("~/IMR_biotic_BES_database/bioticexplorer.duckdb")) file.rename(   normalizePath("~/IMR_biotic_BES_database/bioticexplorer-next.duckdb"),   normalizePath("~/IMR_biotic_BES_database/bioticexplorer.duckdb",                  mustWork = FALSE)) compileDatabase(dbPath = "~/IMR_biotic_BES_database", overwrite = TRUE)

title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
text: want remove database computer, simply delete folder specified dbPath. Remember empty trash bin well.

title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
text: database downloaded saved duckdb database, can use standard DBI dplyr functions access : data objects can now used R: dplyr package can also used databases. difference normal use ’ll need collect() data database filtering. Note handling large amounts data, using collect function incorrectly may cause computer crash due insufficient RAM. Therefore, always filter collecting consider using compute() use data.table package, ’ll need handle large proportions IMR Biotic database. Stations catch (.e., commonname NA) can now found stnall |> filter(!.na(commonname)) (Figure 1). Figure 1. Number IMR Biotic sampling stations per year around 1914 present. Zero catch stations (.na(commonname)) shown red, stations positive catches shown grey. duckdb database contains following data tables:
code: # Packages required to replicate the example: packages <- c("tidyverse", "data.table", "DBI", "duckdb")  # Install packages not yet installed installed_packages <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages()) if (any(installed_packages == FALSE)) {   install.packages(packages[!installed_packages]) }  # Load the packages invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE))  # Connect to the database (assuming you used standard dbPath and name) con_db <- "~/IMR_biotic_BES_database/bioticexplorer.duckdb" %>%    normalizePath() %>%    duckdb::duckdb(read_only = TRUE) %>%    DBI::dbConnect()  ## Create the data objects  stnall <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "stnall") # station-based data indall <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "indall") # individual-based data ageall <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "ageall") # age data mission <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "mission") # information on meta <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "metadata") %>% # time of download   collect() %>% mutate_all(as.POSIXct) csindex <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "csindex") # cruise series index gearlist <- dplyr::tbl(con_db, "gearindex") %>% collect() # gear index head(mission) ## # Source:   SQL [?? x 14] ## # Database: DuckDB 1.5.2 [root@Darwin 25.4.0:R 4.6.0//Users/a22357/IMR_biotic_BES_database/bioticexplorer.duckdb] ##   startyear platformname               cruise missiontype platform missionnumber ##       <int> <chr>                      <chr>  <chr>       <chr>            <int> ## 1      1906 NVG-sampling (Norsk vårgy… <NA>   1           10016                1 ## 2      1907 NVG-sampling (Norsk vårgy… <NA>   1           10016                1 ## 3      1908 NVG-sampling (Norsk vårgy… <NA>   1           10016                1 ## 4      1909 NVG-sampling (Norsk vårgy… <NA>   1           10016                1 ## 5      1910 NVG-sampling (Norsk vårgy… <NA>   1           10016                1 ## 6      1911 NVG-sampling (Norsk vårgy… <NA>   1           10016                1 ## # ℹ 8 more variables: missiontypename <chr>, callsignal <chr>, ## #   missionstartdate <chr>, missionstopdate <chr>, purpose <chr>, ## #   missionid <chr>, cruiseseriescode <chr>, idCruiseseriesSample <chr> stnall %>%   filter(!is.na(cruise)) %>%   collect() %>%   group_by(startyear) %>%   reframe(     n = length(unique(paste(cruise, platformname, serialnumber))),     zero_catch = length(unique(paste(cruise, platformname, serialnumber)[is.na(       commonname     )]))   ) %>%   mutate(n = n - zero_catch) %>%   rename(Positive = n, Zero = zero_catch) %>%   pivot_longer(cols = c(Positive, Zero), names_to = "type", values_to = "n") %>%   ggplot() +   geom_col(aes(x = startyear, y = n, fill = type)) +   scale_fill_manual(values = c("Positive" = "grey", "Zero" = "#C99A9A")) +   scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(1910, 2020, by = 10), expand = c(0, 0)) +   scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +   labs(     x = "Year",     y = "Number of stations",     title = "Number of sampling stations in IMR survey data over years",     fill = "Catch type"   ) +   theme_classic() +   theme(     legend.position = "bottom",     panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.5),     panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.25),     panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.25),     panel.grid.minor.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.1)   ) DBI::dbListTables(con_db) ## [1] "ageall"    "csindex"   "filesize"  "gearindex" "indall"    "metadata"  ## [7] "mission"   "stnall"

title: R Package for Downloading Server-Side Data for BioticExplorer
text: get error something like: Error: ! error evaluating argument ‘drv’ selecting method function ‘dbConnect’: rapi_startup: Failed open database: {“exception_type”:“IO”,“exception_message”:“set lock file … likely database connection write privileges open elsewhere within R session. DuckDB supports one write connection, multiple simultaneus read connections can established. Close connections database: connect database read mode: duckdb::duckdb(read_only = TRUE).
code: DBI::dbDisconnect(con_db)

what: Read and process a NMD Biotic xml file for further use in the BioticExplorer database — bioticToDatabase
title: Read and process a NMD Biotic xml file for further use in the BioticExplorer database — bioticToDatabase
text: wrapper readXmlFile enable use BioticExplorer database

title: Read and process a NMD Biotic xml file for further use in the BioticExplorer database — bioticToDatabase
code: bioticToDatabase(   file,   removeEmpty = FALSE,   convertColumns = FALSE,   returnOriginal = FALSE,   missionidPrefix = NULL,   icesAreas = NULL,   cruiseSeries = NULL,   gearCodes = NULL )

title: Read and process a NMD Biotic xml file for further use in the BioticExplorer database — bioticToDatabase
text: file character string specifying file path xml file. Accepts one file time. removeEmpty logical indicating whether empty columns removed output. convertColumns logical indicating whether column types converted. See link{convertColumnTypes}. Setting FALSE considerably speeds function, leads problems non-unicode characters. returnOriginal logical indicating whether original data ($mission $agedetermination) returned together combined data. missionidPrefix prefix missionid identifier, separates cruises. Used several xml files put together. NULL (default) omits prefix. icesAreas ICES area shape st_polygon abject. Used calculating ICES area specific fishstation. cruiseSeries data.table object NMD cruise series list. Used identify cruise series specific mission. See prepareCruiseSeriesList. gearCodes data.table object NMD gear code list. Used make gearname gearcategory columns. See prepareGearList.

title: Read and process a NMD Biotic xml file for further use in the BioticExplorer database — bioticToDatabase
text: Returns list Biotic data $mission, $stnall $indall data tables. $stnall $indall merged $fishstation $catchsample (former)  $fishstation, $catchsample, $individual $agedetermination (latter).

title: Read and process a NMD Biotic xml file for further use in the BioticExplorer database — bioticToDatabase
text: Mikko Vihtakari, Ibrahim Umar (Institute Marine Research)

title: Download IMR Biotic database and to place it into a duckdb database — compileDatabase
text: years Vector integers specifying years downloaded. database reaches 1914:year(Sys.Date()) dbPath Character string specifying folder duckdb dbIndex files saved. dbIndexFile Character string specifying file path index database saved. Must include .rda end. index used BioticExplorer. dbName Character string NULL. NULL uses default names ("bioticexploer"). overwrite Logical indicating whether existing information duckdb database (dbPath) downloaded overwritten.

Typically made within compileDatabase. icesAreas ICES area shape st_polygon abject. Used calculating ICES area specific fishstation. cruiseSeries data.table object NMD cruise series list. Used identify cruise series specific mission. See prepareCruiseSeriesList. gearCodes data.table object NMD gear code list. Used make gearname gearcategory columns. See prepareGearList. overwrite Logical indicating whether existing information duckdb database (dbPath) downloaded overwritten.

what: Download and parse NMD Biotic data to files — downloadDatabaseToFiles
title: Download and parse NMD Biotic data to files — downloadDatabaseToFiles
text: Downloads annual NMD Biotic data API saves XML /RDS files disk. Unlike downloadDatabase, function write DuckDB database.

title: Download and parse NMD Biotic data to files — downloadDatabaseToFiles
code: downloadDatabaseToFiles(   years,   dest,   method = "compare",   save = c("xml", "rds"),   icesAreas = NULL,   cruiseSeries = NULL,   gearCodes = NULL )

title: Download and parse NMD Biotic data to files — downloadDatabaseToFiles
text: years Vector integers specifying years downloaded. database reaches 1914:year(Sys.Date()) dest Character string specifying folder path downloaded files saved. Subdirectories XMLfiles/ Rdata/ created automatically. method Character string controlling file already exists. "compare" (default) re-downloads overwrites; "keep" skips existing files. save Character vector output formats. Can include "xml" (raw XML, always saved) /"rds" (parsed bioticToDatabase output RDS). icesAreas ICES area shape st_polygon abject. Used calculating ICES area specific fishstation. cruiseSeries data.table object NMD cruise series list. Used identify cruise series specific mission. See prepareCruiseSeriesList. gearCodes data.table object NMD gear code list. Used make gearname gearcategory columns. See prepareGearList.

title: Download and parse NMD Biotic data to files — downloadDatabaseToFiles
text: Called side effects: saves XML /RDS files dest. Returns NULL invisibly.

title: Index BioticExplorer database — indexDatabase
text: connection Object defining duckdb connection. Typically made within compileDatabase. dbIndexFile Character string specifying file path index database saved. Must include .rda end. index used BioticExplorer. fileOnly Logical indicating whether result saved file returned. FALSE, file made result returned instead.

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.5.0
text: Fixed critical crash caused self-referential default arguments (icesAreas = icesAreas, cruiseSeries = cruiseSeries, gearCodes = gearCodes) bioticToDatabase(), downloadDatabase(), downloadDatabaseToFiles(). now default NULL load bundled package data function body. stndat merge changed right join (.y = TRUE) full outer join (= TRUE), empty fishing stations (tows catch) now correctly preserved $stnall commonname = NA instead silently dropped. Individual records matched catch sample entry now emit warning excluded $indall age merges, rather stopping execution error. Added guard empty age data (nrow(age) == 0) computing $ageall prevent crashes surveys age readings. Fixed progress bar maximum bioticToDatabase() (10 → 11 steps) indexDatabase() (6 → 7 steps). Fixed outdated API URL downloadDatabaseToFiles() (old tomcat7.imr.:8080 → biotic-api.hi.). Fixed typo “Gead codes” → “Gear codes” compileDatabase().

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.5.0
text: Added pkgdown website. Added comprehensive @return documentation exported functions. Added NEWS.md.

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.4.4
text: 2025-02-25 Updated Biotic API URL https://biotic-api.hi.. Rewrote prepareTaxaList() handle missing names taxa reference list. Updated reference API URL.

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.4.3
text: 2025-01-22 Completed conversion MonetDB DuckDB. Fixed dbPath handling Windows. Added read_only connection mode documentation README.

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.4.x
text: 2022–2024 Increased download timeout limit. Fixed bug age element bioticToDatabase(). Fixed bug calculation numberofreads $ageall. Removed debugging messages prepareCruiseSeriesList(). Added age readings $ageall. Fixed warning prepareCruiseSeriesList(). Turned s2 ICES area determination improve spatial join compatibility. Fixed crash compileDatabase() → indexDatabase(). Fixed default path index file.

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.3.x
text: 2021 Replaced sp rgdal dependencies sf spatial operations. Fixed CRS transform issue Linux (sf#1419). Fixed ICES area CRS assignment. Fixed critical issue NA commonname values crashing database compilation. Stopped converting station dates .Date preserve time-zone information.

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.2.x
text: 2020–2021 Transitioned MonetDBLite DuckDB embedded database engine. Added ICES area calculation using bundled simplified polygons. Added cruise series information index (csindex table). Added age reading data ($ageall / ageall table). Added gear category classification. Added downloadDatabaseToFiles() saving XML RDS outputs. Improved performance indexDatabase().

title: BioticExplorerServer 0.1.0
text: 2020-05-14 Initial release. compileDatabase(), downloadDatabase(), bioticToDatabase(), indexDatabase() functions. DuckDB backend storing NMD Biotic data parsed annual XML files. ICES area gear category added station data. Cruise series index stored database.
